title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quant trader who managed $10 billion daily in trading strategies, left finance to build QFEX, a proposed 24/7 global stock exchange. He critiques high-frequency trading as extracting value through structural market flaws rather than adding genuine value, and discusses how lucrative finance roles trap top talent from pursuing more meaningful work.
